title: diplazium manilense
intro: Diplazium manilense, also known as the Manilense shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Diplazium manilense include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or topical applications, and is also used in traditional remedies such as poultices and salves.
